prompt:
Conduct a simple linear regression problem and solve it using the gradient descent method. Please generate code and write an experimental report based on the following requirements:

Input: "data.csv"

1. Code Implementation: Perform simple linear regression using gradient descent. Output: "linear_regression_code.py". Visualize training data and regression results. Output: "training_results.png". Plot the relationship between the cost function and the number of iterations. Output: "cost_function_plot.png". Plot the 3D relationship graph of parameters (w, b) and the cost function, as well as the 2D contour graph. Output: "3D_contour_plot.png"

2. Experimental Report: Write an experimental report with a detailed description of: the selection and processing of the dataset, the implementation steps of the gradient descent method, analysis and discussion of the regression results, interpretation of the visualization charts. Output: "experimental_report.pdf"
expected: 1. Visualization: Visualization Validation — training_results.png, cost_function_plot.png, 3D_contour_plot.png all generated. 2. Report: Report Completeness Score — experimental_report.pdf with dataset description, gradient descent steps, results analysis.
